arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag bemoans defensive lapses as Man United waste flying start in Porto
arts.sum: The visitors threw away a 2-0 lead before snatching a late point.

arts.ttl: What Erik ten Hag and Ruud van Nistelrooy did to Man United squad after Porto draw
arts.sum: Harry Maguire's last-gasp equaliser saw Manchester United come away with a 3-3 draw against FC Porto in the Europa League after being 2-0 up.

arts.ttl: Porto vs. Man United: Erik ten Hag reveals why he replaced Marcus Rashford at half time
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag reveals he replaced Marcus Rashford at half time because they need to rotate ahead of their trip to Aston Villa on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Harry Maguire gives five-word verdict in response to Erik ten Hag sack fears
arts.sum: Harry Maguire is involved in yet another scenario where a Manchester United manager is facing the sack with Erik ten Hag coming under increasing pressure at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag explains Marcus Rashford withdrawal
arts.sum: We need fresh players also for Sunday so, yes, it was all in the plan.” We sub them because on Sunday we have another hard game, a good game, so we need players to be available and be fit and be fresh.

arts.ttl: Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag explains why Marcus Rashford came off vs Porto
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford was surprisingly substituted by Erik ten Hag at half-time after scoring one and assisting another for Man United in Porto.

arts.ttl: Porto vs. Man United: Five unwanted stats Erik ten Hag will not want to see after 3-3 draw
arts.sum: Five more unwanted stats rear their head as Manchester United drop more points from a winning position away to Porto in the Europa League.

arts.ttl: Harry Maguire blames Man Utd team-mates and not Erik ten Hag after Porto collapse
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag is under huge pressure as Manchester United manager following his side's capitulation from 2-0 up against Porto, but Harry Maguire thinks the players should take the blame

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag baffles Man Utd fans with reason for Marcus Rashford substitution vs Porto
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag subbed Marcus Rashford off at half-time during Manchester United's dramatic 3-3 draw away to Porto on Thursday, despite him scoring and assisting in the first half

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag sets new embarrassing record as Man Utd boss edges closer to the sack
arts.sum: Manchester United's defensive frailties were clear for all to see during their six-goal thriller in Porto as Erik ten Hag saw his team set an unwanted stat with goals against them easy to come by
